# Ignore Visual Studio temporary files, build results, and
# files generated by popular Visual Studio add-ons.

# User-specific files
*.rsuser
*.user
*.suo
*.userosscache
*.sln.docstates

# User-specific files (MonoDevelop/Xamarin Studio)
*.userprefs

# User-specific files (JetBrains Rider)
.idea/**/workspace.xml
.idea/**/tasks.xml
.idea/**/usage.statistics.xml
.idea/**/dictionaries
.idea/**/shelf

# Build results
[Dd]ebug/
[Dd]ebugPublic/
[Rr]elease/
[Rr]eleases/
x64/
x86/
[Aa][Rr][Mm]/
[Aa][Rr][Mm]64/
bld/
[Bb]in/
[Oo]bj/

# VS 2019
.vs/Project1/v17/ipch/

# Auto-generated files
mono_crash.*

# Windows image file caches
Thumbs.db
ehthumbs.db

# Folder config file
Desktop.ini

# Recycle Bin used on file shares
$RECYCLE.BIN/

# Linux/Mac Trash
.Trash-*/

# JetBrains Rider
.idea
